The '''''Scorpion IV''''' was a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] that was part of the [[Lumiya's fleet|fleet]] of [[Lumiya]] shortly after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. It carried a missile launcher turret in its tail section.<ref name="Lumiya: Dark Star of the Empire" />

==Appearances==
*{{GalaxyCite|3|Lumiya: Dark Star of the Empire}} {{Mo}}
